## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outreach and GrowthX to discuss content performance, LLM visibility, and strategic planning.](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows declining clicks but increasing impressions; likely due to broader SEO landscape changes and potential Google Search Console reporting issues](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [LLM visibility for Outreach is steadily growing, with citations up across major platforms](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Team to focus on identifying content gaps where competitors (especially Gong) are outperforming Outreach in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [New content strategy to incorporate proprietary data reports and address identified gaps in LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Overall site performance: Clicks decreasing, impressions increasing](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Non-branded performance showing slight decline](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Top blog posts (e.g., sales email templates) performing well after refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Potential strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [A/B testing SERP-optimized titles and meta descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Updating outdated content and meta information](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Leveraging LLM visibility tactics](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### LLM Visibility and Strategy

  - [Steady growth in LLM citations, up across major platforms (except slight dips in Copilot and Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Top landing pages from LLM traffic identified, with homepage leading](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [Discussion on Scrunch tool limitations and interpretation of "responses" metric](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Focus on identifying where competitors (especially Gong) are mentioned but Outreach isn't](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Plan to export competitor presence data for team review and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

### Content Pipeline and Guidelines

  - [New workflow incorporating in-house built agentic pipeline system](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Writing guidelines document shared to improve content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Discussion on potential new content topics:](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Call coaching or manual version of the score](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Deal personalization (vs. email personalization)](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [Real-time suggestions during sales meetings](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)

### Proprietary Data Content Strategy

  - [Plans to create reports using Outreach's proprietary data](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Aim to boost content uniqueness and authority in the industry](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Potential to refresh existing articles or create new pillar pages with this data](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Megan to export Scrunch data focusing on Gong's presence in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Team to review new proposed topics in the "considering" tab, which address identified keyword gaps](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Hadassah and team to audit existing content for potential revamps based on LLM visibility gaps](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Develop strategy to create content around topics where Outreach wants to improve LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Continue building out the writing guidelines document for improved content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
